content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Cat
description: Legendary class mod for Maya in Borderlands 2. Manufactured by Hyperion.
notes: Added with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge. Unavailable without this DLC.

special.description:
Boosts SMG damage heavily in exchange for reduced accuracy.

At max level: +142.5% SMG damage, -40% SMG accuracy.

Across all versions (up to): +141% SMG damage, -43% SMG accuracy.

Possible skill bonuses (up to +5): Mind's Eye, Wreck, Accelerate, Reaper, Foresight.
special.title: "Rawr."
